title: 目が離せないお嬢様たち

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While eating in the cafeteria, I overhear Mejiro
Bright and Fine Motion having a discussion.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: A message from a prince?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes. This morning I received an email from
someone claiming to be the prince of a certain
country.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, he has a surplus of wealth and is
searching for someone who will use that money
effectively.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so he's a philanthropist? But I wonder if a
member of royalty would send an email like that.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: So, did you reply?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I refused his offer. There's no way I can
accept money from a complete stranger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But then I received another message saying the
prince was involved in an accident...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: My, what are the chances!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, he was seriously injured and is
requesting assistance with his medical costs.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Hold on. Wasn't this the same fellow who had so
much money he wanted to give it away?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: He said all his money burned up in the accident.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so all his funds were in cash? And this must
have been a mighty fire to have destroyed all that
capital. It's strange that I haven't seen any news
about it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to remain silent any longer, I intrude upon
their conversation.
choice_data_list: It's all a bunch of lies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: What? Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I thought it all sounded a smidge too
convenient! His claim of being a prince, then
getting hurt in an accident—so it was all a big
scam, then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it seems so obvious now! Well, that's an
enormous relief.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It means there was no accident, and that no one
was hurt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite almost being deceived by this "prince,"
Mejiro Bright still feels a great sense of relief.
choice_data_list: You really are a kind person.

You need to learn a little more about how the
world works.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The news about the accident felt so sudden that I
was simply overcome with worry. I didn't think to
question it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's a fine shame there are people out there trying
to take advantage of that sort of good will. Let's
be sure to stay vigilant, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, absolutely! Thank you very much for your
advice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: How the world works... I see.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, you should be able to tell
whether an email is a scam or not.
choice_data_list:
It's best to ignore emails from people you don't
know.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense! And it sounds much better than
checking each and every message one by one.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate your advice. I'll definitely be more
careful from now on!
choice_data_list:
You should also change your email address if
possible.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! It'd be quite the bother if that false
prince contacted you again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You're absolutely right! ...So how would one do
that?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Uhh, I'm sorry, I don't know either! My security
team handles that sort of thing for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I end up helping Mejiro Bright change her
email address.
